personalStatement:
I design and deploy end-to-end ML pipelines, translating research insight into robust engineering systems.

 I'm drawn to interdisciplinary, generalizable, and novel problems. I work best in environments that balance collaboration with ownership.

Right now, I’m building agentic and multimodal AI.
